intake.topic_summary: raw 122 (persistent-homology, Q5) + raw 135 (tropical-min-plus) + P1-P8 + Q1-Q8 + R1-R8 absorbed pool 직후 외부에서 N=1 single distinct-genus candidate paradigm 선정. 선정: design-strategy-optimal-transport-monge-kantorovich-brenier-otto — Monge 1781 (problème des déblais et remblais) + Kantorovich 1942 (LP relaxation + duality) + Brenier 1991 (polar factorization theorem: optimal map for quadratic cost is gradient of convex potential T=∇φ) + Otto 2001 (Riemannian gradient flow on Wasserstein space P_2(M); JKO scheme) + Villani 2009 textbook 'Optimal Transport: Old and New' + Cuturi 2013 (Sinkhorn entropic regularization). genus = measure-space coupling π ∈ Π(μ,ν) on product space X×Y minimizing ∫c(x,y)dπ; Kantorovich LP dual max∫φdμ+∫ψdν s.t. φ(x)+ψ(y)≤c(x,y); Wasserstein metric W_p(μ,ν)=(inf∫c^p dπ)^(1/p); P_2 as infinite-dim Riemannian manifold (Otto calculus). 18 absorbed paradigm (raw 122 / raw 135 / P1-P8 / Q1-Q8 / R1-R8) 모두 algebraic/structural distinct: persistent-homology (Q5) 는 algebraic-topological invariant on filtered complex; OT 는 measure-coupling-on-product-space. P3 information-budget (Shannon mutual info ensemble entropy) vs OT (Wasserstein metric on entire measure space). R4 Pareto (partial-order non-dominated set on vectors) vs OT (scalar transport cost minimization over couplings). 5 closest false-positive 후보 (R4 Pareto / P3 info-budget / P5 Bayesian / S4 LDP-not-absorbed / S3 info-geometry-not-absorbed) absorption FAIL.

axis_a.rationale: raw 122 (persistent-homology Q5) + raw 135 (tropical-min-plus) + P1-P8 + Q1-Q8 + R1-R8 absorbed-18 직후 외부에서 ONE single distinct-genus paradigm 선정. axis_a 는 'WHICH single paradigm' — algebraic-topology-on-filtered-complex (raw 122) / binary-algebra-on-scalars (raw 135) / 8-paradigm P-pool / 8-paradigm Q-pool / 8-paradigm R-pool 모두와 distinct genus = MEASURE-SPACE-COUPLING-AND-WASSERSTEIN-METRIC. axis_b ('HOW STRONG novelty-falsifier 3-tuple vs 18 absorbed') 와 axis_c ('whether NON-OVERLAP w/ 5 prior pools') 와 직교. α envelope (tui 56-cell measurability matrix) → axis_c grid block-by-block enforcement anchor. β byte 19 mod 3=1 → axis_b hot. γ envelope (Gaia stellar density) → channel[3] Wasserstein gradient flow on phase-space density.

candidate_paradigm.novel_contribution_vs_prior_pool: raw 122 persistent-homology 는 ALGEBRAIC-TOPOLOGICAL invariant on FILTERED CHAIN COMPLEX C•(K_t) → Hk(K_t) functor → ZGM decomposition into interval modules (barcode); 1-categorical functor R→Vec_k. raw 135 tropical-min-plus 는 IDEMPOTENT SEMIRING (a⊕a=a) binary algebra on scalars (ℝ_max). T1 OT 는 MEASURE-SPACE COUPLING π ∈ Π(μ,ν) on product (X×Y, μ⊗ν marginal) minimizing ∫c(x,y)dπ — 'transport plan' as joint probability measure with prescribed marginals; Kantorovich LP duality (max ∫φdμ+∫ψdν s.t. φ⊕ψ≤c); Brenier polar factorization (for quadratic cost c=|x-y|² and absolutely continuous μ, optimal coupling supported on graph of T=∇φ where φ convex potential — ∇·(μ∇φ)=ν reduces to Monge-Ampère PDE); Otto Riemannian calculus on Wasserstein space P_2(M) — heat eq = grad flow of (negative) entropy under W_2 metric; JKO scheme (Jordan-Kinderlehrer-Otto 1998) discretizes Fokker-Planck as W_2-prox iteration. P3 info-budget (Shannon I(X;Y) ensemble entropy) vs T1 (W_p(μ,ν) transport-cost metric) — entropy-functional vs metric-on-measures distinct. R4 Pareto (partial-order non-dominated set on objective vectors) vs T1 (scalar minimization over couplings — single transport-cost objective, not multi-objective). P5 Bayesian (commutative real ring posterior weight update) vs T1 (joint measure π with marginal constraints — coupling not weight-update). Q5 persistent-homology (Q5) algebraic-topological filtered invariant vs T1 measure-coupling on product space. raw 135 tropical (binary algebra on scalars) vs T1 (variational problem on measures). 5 closest false-positive 후보 (P3 / P5 / R4 / S4 LDP-not-absorbed / S3 info-geometry-not-absorbed) absorption FAIL 명시.
candidate_paradigm.primary_mechanism: two prescribed probability measures μ on X and ν on Y (X,Y Polish spaces, e.g. R^d); cost function c: X×Y → R∪{+∞} (often c(x,y)=|x-y|^p for p≥1); coupling Π(μ,ν) = {π ∈ P(X×Y) : (proj_X)_*π=μ, (proj_Y)_*π=ν}; Monge problem: minimize ∫c(x, T(x))dμ(x) over measurable T:X→Y with T_*μ=ν (existence rare); Kantorovich relaxation: minimize OT_c(μ,ν)=inf_{π∈Π(μ,ν)} ∫c(x,y)dπ(x,y) (always exists by weak compactness + l.s.c. cost); Kantorovich-Rubinstein duality: OT_c=sup{∫φdμ+∫ψdν : φ(x)+ψ(y)≤c(x,y)}; for c=|x-y|², Brenier theorem: unique π* concentrated on graph of T=∇φ where φ:X→R convex, satisfying Monge-Ampère det(D²φ)=μ/(ν∘∇φ); Wasserstein metric W_p(μ,ν)=(OT_{|·|^p})^{1/p}, p≥1; (P_p(R^d), W_p) complete separable metric space; Otto 2001 formal Riemannian: tangent at μ ≃ {gradient potentials ∇ψ}, metric ⟨∇ψ_1,∇ψ_2⟩_μ=∫⟨∇ψ_1,∇ψ_2⟩dμ; geodesic μ_t = ((1-t)id + t∇φ)_*μ_0 (displacement interpolation, McCann 1997); JKO scheme: μ^{n+1} = argmin_ν F(ν) + (1/2τ)W_2²(μ^n, ν) discretizes ∂_t μ = -grad_W F(μ); F(μ)=∫(μ log μ)dx → Fokker-Planck/heat eq; Sinkhorn entropic regularization (Cuturi 2013): OT_c^ε(μ,ν)=inf ∫c dπ + ε KL(π|μ⊗ν), solution π=diag(u)Kdiag(v) with K_{ij}=exp(-c(x_i,y_j)/ε), u,v alternating Sinkhorn iteration scaling.
candidate_paradigm.primary_existing_raw_anchor: raw 122 (Q5 persistent-homology — algebraic-topological filtered invariant; T1 measure-coupling on product space; algebraic-topology-functor vs measure-coupling-on-product distinct genus) + raw 135 (tropical-min-plus — idempotent semiring binary algebra on scalars; T1 variational coupling minimization on probability measures; binary-algebra-on-scalars vs LP-on-measure-couplings distinct) + raw 113 P5 Bayesian (commutative real ring posterior multiplicative update; T1 marginal-constrained coupling minimization; weight-update vs coupling-minimization distinct) + raw 130 R4 Pareto (partial-order non-dominated set on objective vectors; T1 single scalar transport-cost minimization over coupling space; multi-objective-non-dominated vs single-objective-LP-on-couplings distinct) + raw 111 P3 information-budget (Shannon I(X;Y) ensemble entropy on joint distribution; T1 W_p(μ,ν) transport-cost metric on measure space; entropy-functional-on-joint vs transport-metric-on-marginals distinct)
candidate_paradigm.raw_126_self_host_stability_declaration: k_step_byte_eq_witness=YES (Sinkhorn iteration on (μ_n, ν_n) two-marginal cost matrix C with regularization ε>0 converges to fixed point u*, v* up to floating-point precision; 동일 (μ,ν,c,ε) input 두 번 적용 시 byte-eq scaling vectors); k_step_classifier_pass_witness=YES (W_p(μ,ν) computed twice on identical inputs → identical metric value, deterministic for discrete supports + LP solver); divergence_tolerance_if_unbounded=YES (unbounded cost c(x,y)=+∞ on incompatible support pairs allowed; W_p=+∞ when ∫|x|^p dμ=∞ or measures have non-overlapping unbounded support — explicit divergence tolerance via extended-real-valued metric); n_step_general_bound=O(n^3 log n) Hungarian for discrete OT on n points / O(n² K) for K Sinkhorn iterations on n×n cost matrix / O(n² log n) for 1D OT (sort-based) / Monge-Ampère PDE solve via semi-discrete OT O(n log n) per iter; fixpoint_or_oscillation_classification=fixpoint (Kantorovich LP has unique optimal value (cost), Brenier theorem guarantees a.e. unique optimal map T=∇φ for c=|x-y|² + abs cont μ; Sinkhorn Sinkhorn-Knopp theorem guarantees unique scaling fixed point up to common scalar; W_p geodesic structure unique by McCann displacement interpolation theorem)
cognitive_frameworks_cited: Monge 1781 'Mémoire sur la théorie des déblais et remblais' Académie Royale des Sciences Paris (founding question — minimum-cost transport of mass)
Kantorovich 1942 'On the translocation of masses' Doklady Akad. Nauk SSSR 37:199 (LP relaxation + duality — Nobel Prize Economics 1975)
Brenier 1991 'Polar factorization and monotone rearrangement of vector-valued functions' Comm. Pure Appl. Math. 44:375 (T=∇φ for c=|x-y|² — bridges Monge-Ampère PDE and OT)

Otto 2001 'The geometry of dissipative evolution equations: the porous medium equation' Comm. PDE 26:101 + Jordan-Kinderlehrer-Otto 1998 SIAM J. Math. Anal. 29:1 (Wasserstein space Riemannian formal calculus + JKO gradient flow scheme)
Villani 2009 'Optimal Transport: Old and New' Grundlehren 338 Springer (comprehensive textbook — modern OT foundation)
realization_channels: discrete optimal transport (assignment problem): n source + n sink + n×n cost matrix C_{ij}=c(x_i,y_j) → Hungarian / auction / network simplex algorithm; cognitive frame: combinatorial optimization / linear programming

Sinkhorn entropic regularization (Cuturi 2013 NeurIPS 'Sinkhorn distances'): OT_c^ε with KL penalty → matrix scaling fixed point u_i, v_j s.t. π_{ij}=u_i K_{ij} v_j with K=exp(-C/ε); cognitive frame: machine learning / GPU-parallel iterative scaling

Wasserstein gradient flow / JKO scheme (Jordan-Kinderlehrer-Otto 1998): heat equation ∂_t μ = ∇·(μ∇log μ) = -grad_{W_2} (Boltzmann entropy)(μ); cognitive frame: PDE / non-equilibrium thermodynamics / continuum mechanics

Wasserstein GAN (Arjovsky-Chintala-Bottou 2017 ICML): generator G_θ samples; critic f_w 1-Lipschitz approximates Kantorovich-Rubinstein dual; W_1(P_data, P_θ) = sup_{‖f‖_L≤1} E_{P_data}[f] - E_{P_θ}[f]; cognitive frame: generative deep learning / weight clipping or gradient penalty
candidate_paradigm.counter_example_where_not_applicable: design with no NATURAL PROBABILITY MEASURES on input/output spaces — OT presupposes (μ, ν) pair as probability measures with marginal compatibility; pure logical/symbolic systems without measure-theoretic interpretation degenerate. 또한 design with NO NATURAL COST FUNCTION c(x,y) on product space (e.g. categorical labels with no metric structure / type-theoretic terms with no quantitative distance) — OT minimizes ∫c dπ, requires meaningful c. 또한 design where structure is ALGEBRAIC-TOPOLOGICAL invariant on filtered complex (raw 122 persistent-homology — Hk(K_t) functor) — OT operates on probability measures, not on simplicial chain complexes; persistence diagram is multiset in R² but its structure is decomposition of k[t]-module not coupling of measures. 또한 design where structure is BINARY ALGEBRA on scalars (raw 135 tropical idempotent semiring) — OT is variational problem on coupling space (LP), not algebraic operation on scalar elements. 또한 design where structure is PARTIAL-ORDER non-dominated set on multi-objective vectors (R4 Pareto) — OT is single-objective scalar cost minimization, not multi-objective non-dominance.

novelty_falsifier_triple.algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind: measure-space-coupling-LP-on-product-space-vs-{algebraic-topology-functor-on-filtered-complex (raw 122), idempotent-semiring-binary-algebra-on-scalars (raw 135), 8-paradigm P-pool diverse algebraic structures (P1-P8: adversarial-game-theoretic / systematic-ablation / Shannon-entropy-budget / categorical-functor-composition / commutative-real-ring-Bayesian-posterior / coalgebraic-bisimulation / perturbation-anti-fragility / energy-landscape-Hamiltonian), 8-paradigm Q-pool (Q1-Q8: recursive-fixpoint / temporal-decay-half-life / counterfactual-causal-twin / reservoir-edge-of-chaos / persistent-homology / active-info-acquisition / byzantine-consensus / hierarchical-temporal-abstraction), 8-paradigm R-pool (R1-R8: game-equilibrium / renormalization-scale-invariance / differential-privacy-budget / Pareto-multi-objective / thermodynamic-Landauer / operadic-higher-categorical / predictive-coding-FEP / quotient-canonical-form)} — T1 OT primary object is JOINT PROBABILITY MEASURE π ∈ P(X×Y) with marginal-constraints (proj_X)_*π=μ, (proj_Y)_*π=ν, minimizing linear functional ∫c dπ (linear programming on infinite-dim measure space); 18 absorbed paradigm 어느 것도 'measure-coupling on product space minimizing transport cost' 을 primary mechanism 으로 하지 않음
novelty_falsifier_triple.absorption_test_negative_result: raw 122 persistent-homology (Q5) 'OT-as-filtered-Wasserstein' suffix 추가 시도: OT_c는 (μ,ν) two-measure coupling, persistence는 filtered-complex Hk(K_t) functor — 두 measure 사이 coupling은 not a chain complex / not a functor R→Vec_k; barcode는 unique decomposition of k[t]-module, OT는 LP on coupling space; categorical-level 다름 (algebraic-topological vs measure-theoretic). raw 135 tropical-min-plus 'tropical-Wasserstein' 시도: tropical은 binary algebra ⊕=min on scalars (idempotent semiring), OT는 LP on coupling measures; 'min' tropical 은 element-binary, OT min은 functional-min over coupling space (infinite-dim variational); element-vs-functional dim mismatch. P3 information-budget (Shannon I(X;Y)) 'OT-as-info-budget' 시도: Shannon I(X;Y)=H(X)+H(Y)-H(X,Y)는 ensemble entropy functional (logarithmic), OT W_p는 metric on measure space (geometric); 두 measure가 동일 (μ=ν) 일 때 W_p=0 이지만 I(X;X)=H(X)≠0; entropy-functional vs metric-on-measures genealogy distinct. P5 Bayesian (raw 113) 'OT-as-Bayesian-coupling' 시도: Bayesian posterior P(θ|D)∝P(D|θ)P(θ)는 weight multiplicative update (commutative real ring), OT는 coupling π with marginal constraints minimizing ∫c dπ (linear programming); weight-update vs LP-coupling-minimization mismatch. R4 Pareto (raw 130) 'OT-as-Pareto-frontier' 시도: Pareto frontier는 set of non-dominated vectors {x : ∄y ≼ x in partial order}, OT는 single scalar value W_p(μ,ν); multi-objective-set vs single-objective-scalar dim distinct. R5 Landauer 'OT-as-thermodynamic-cost' 시도: Landauer는 kT ln 2 per bit erasure (information-theoretic energy bound), OT는 geometric metric on measure space; thermodynamic-bound vs geometric-metric distinct. R6 operadic 'OT-as-operad-of-couplings' 시도: operad은 multilinear composition algebra, OT는 single-binary cost functional minimization; n-ary-composition vs binary-coupling distinct. R7 predictive-coding 'OT-as-FEP' 시도: FEP는 variational free energy F=E_q[log q]-E_q[log p] hierarchical brain, OT는 transport cost between two given measures; both involve measures but FEP is variational-inference upper bound (KL-divergence based), OT is metric (transport-cost based — not KL); divergence-vs-metric distinct. Q1 recursive-fixpoint 'OT-as-iteration-fixpoint' 시도: Sinkhorn iteration converges to fixed point u*,v* but recursive-fixpoint paradigm is META-pattern across all iterative methods (Banach contraction, Knaster-Tarski, etc.); OT의 fixpoint는 specific instance, not the genus. Q5 persistent-homology = raw 122 위 absorbed, 동일 paradigm. Q4 reservoir-edge-of-chaos 'OT-as-chaos-edge' 시도: dynamical system computational capacity at criticality, OT는 static metric on measure space; dynamical-vs-static + computational-capacity-vs-transport-metric mismatch. P4 categorical-functor-composition 'OT-as-functor' 시도: P4는 functor composition F∘G in category theory (morphism associativity), OT는 measure-coupling LP — coupling Π(μ,ν) is set of measures not a functor; operation-on-measures vs functor-composition mismatch.
false_positive_candidate_raw_set: raw 113 P5 design-bayesian-evidence-accumulation — closest as 'update on probability measures' but Bayesian = posterior weight multiplicative update via Bayes rule (commutative real ring on probability weights); OT = coupling with marginal constraints minimizing transport cost (LP on infinite-dim measure space); absorption FAIL by weight-multiplicative-update vs coupling-LP-minimization distinct mechanism; sub-suffix 'OT-via-Bayesian-coupling' rejected by raw 106 species-suffix-ban + categorical-level mismatch

raw 111 P3 design-information-theoretic-budget — closest as 'information measure on joint distribution' (mutual info I(X;Y)=H(X)+H(Y)-H(X,Y)); OT = W_p(μ,ν) geometric metric (transport cost); absorption FAIL by entropy-logarithmic-functional vs geometric-metric distinct genealogy (Shannon ensemble vs Monge-Kantorovich coupling); μ=ν gives W_p=0 but I(X;X)=H(X)≠0 — distinct sensitivity to identity

raw 130 R4 design-pareto-multi-objective — closest as 'partial-order on outcomes' but Pareto = partial-order non-dominated set on objective vectors (multi-objective set), OT = single-objective scalar W_p (one transport cost); absorption FAIL by multi-objective-set-vs-single-scalar-LP + non-dominance-vs-cost-minimization distinct content

S4 LDP large-deviation-principle (NOT absorbed, sibling pool) — closest as 'rate function I(x) on probability measure' (Cramér theorem μ_n empirical distribution P(μ_n ∈ A) ≈ exp(-n inf_{μ∈A} I(μ))); LDP = asymptotic exponential decay rate (Sanov on KL-divergence); OT = static finite-distance W_p metric (single-scale geometric); absorption FAIL by asymptotic-exponential-decay-rate-functional vs static-geometric-metric distinct + entropic-rate-vs-transport-distance distinct

S3 info-geometry Fisher-metric Riemannian-manifold-on-distributions (NOT absorbed, sibling pool) — closest as 'metric on probability distributions' but info-geom Fisher metric = (g_{ij}(θ))=E[∂_i log p_θ ∂_j log p_θ] on PARAMETRIC distribution family with statistical manifold M={p_θ:θ∈Θ}; OT W_p = metric on ENTIRE space P(X) of all measures (non-parametric) with transport-cost-based geodesic; absorption FAIL by parametric-Fisher-metric-on-{p_θ}-vs-non-parametric-Wasserstein-on-P(X) distinct manifold + Fisher-divergence-vs-transport-coupling distinct mechanism (info-geom is local geometry of parametric family; OT is global geometry of all measures with displacement interpolation)

T1 OT primary object은 JOINT PROBABILITY MEASURE π ∈ P(X×Y) with marginal constraints (proj_X)_*π=μ, (proj_Y)_*π=ν; W_p(μ,ν)는 LP value of inf∫c^p dπ. 'algebraic-topological invariant of filtered complex' (raw 122) vs 'measure-theoretic LP on coupling space' (T1) 차원 mismatch. categorical-level: raw 122는 1-cat functor on poset → Vec_k category morphism diagram chase; T1는 measure-theoretic LP on product Polish space — both involve mathematics but algebraic-topology-of-shapes vs measure-theory-of-distributions distinct genealogy.

'binary algebra on scalars' (raw 135) vs 'LP on infinite-dim measure-coupling space' (T1) 차원 mismatch. 'min' overlap superficial: raw 135 ⊕=min은 element-binary on ℝ_max, T1 OT 'min'은 functional-min over coupling space (variational inf). element-vs-functional dim distinct.

R7 FEP (둘 다 measures + variational) → absorption FAIL by KL-divergence-based-variational-inference vs transport-cost-based-metric distinct.

axes_surfaced.name: single novel paradigm enumeration (N=1) — DEPTH-only conservative distinct-genus from 18 absorbed (raw 122 + raw 135 + P1-P8 + Q1-Q8 + R1-R8)
options_considered: A. 'Pick free-probability / non-commutative-probability (Voiculescu 1985 — free independence replacing classical independence; R-transform; free cumulants Speicher 1994)' (rejected: cognitive-framework rich but P1 adversarial-co-evolution (game-theoretic algebra of 2-player) + S6 quantum-amplitude (complex non-commutative ring) sibling 와 'non-commutative algebra of random variables' 영역 partial overlap risk; absorption FAIL 입증 부담 증가)

B. 'Pick algorithmic-information-theory / Kolmogorov-Solomonoff-Chaitin (K(x) = shortest program length; Solomonoff universal prior M(x)=2^{-K(x)}; MDL principle Rissanen 1978)' (rejected: P3 information-theoretic-budget (Shannon ensemble entropy) 와 'information measure' 영역 partial overlap — distinct (ensemble vs individual-string complexity) 이지만 user 'new mathematical foundation only' 강한 조건 하에서 둘이 동일 'information theory umbrella' 라 categorical separability 약화)

C. 'Pick optimal-transport / Wasserstein-Kantorovich-Brenier-Otto (Monge 1781 + Kantorovich 1942 LP duality + Brenier 1991 polar factorization T=∇φ + Otto 2001 Riemannian gradient flow on Wasserstein space P_2(M) + JKO 1998 + Sinkhorn-Cuturi 2013 entropic regularization + Villani 2009 textbook)' (chosen: F1 single + F2 3-tuple novelty-falsifier strict + F5 cross-non-overlap; measure-space-coupling-LP-on-product-space (T1) vs algebraic-topology-functor (raw 122) + idempotent-semiring (raw 135) + 8 P-pool + 8 Q-pool + 8 R-pool 모두 distinct mathematical foundation; deterministic-verifier 가 marginal-constraint Π(μ,ν) + ∫c dπ LP + Brenier polar factorization existence theorem 로 schema-level)

D. 'Pick sheaf-theoretic / topos-theoretic (Grothendieck SGA 1957-72 — sheaf as functor with locality+gluing; topos as generalized space + intuitionistic logic)' (rejected: P4 categorical-functor-composition + R6 operadic-higher-categorical 와 'categorical foundations of mathematics' 영역 partial overlap — sheaf 는 specific functor subclass with locality axiom + gluing, P4 functor-composition 와 R6 operad 가 둘 다 categorical algebra 영역 차지; distinct-genus 입증 어려움 risk)

E. 'Pick determinantal-point-process / DPP / Pfaffian-process (Macchi 1975 + Borodin-Okounkov + Hough-Krishnapur-Peres 2009 — K(x_i,x_j)_ij determinant defines correlation, repulsive point pattern)' (rejected: P3 information-theoretic-budget + S5 spectral-graph 와 'kernel-based / spectral' 영역 partial overlap — DPP는 K Hermitian kernel determinant 로 spectral-graph eigenvalue 구조 와 partial overlap; channel 다양성 4 확보가 어렵 — DPP는 주로 statistical-physics + ML diversity 두 영역)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — design-strategy-optimal-transport-monge-kantorovich-brenier-otto 단일 후보. measure-coupling π ∈ Π(μ,ν) on product space minimizing ∫c(x,y)dπ → Kantorovich LP duality → Brenier polar factorization T=∇φ (quadratic cost) → Otto Riemannian formal gradient flow on P_2(M) → JKO discretization → Sinkhorn entropic regularization. Monge 1781 + Kantorovich 1942 + Brenier 1991 + Otto 2001 + Villani 2009 의 5 cognitive frameworks; discrete OT / Sinkhorn / Wasserstein gradient flow / Wasserstein GAN 4 realization channels.
axes_surfaced.rationale: α envelope (tui 56-cell measurability matrix) → axis_c 5×T1 grid block-by-block enforcement (5 prior pool 각각 NON_OVERLAP verdict + structural_mismatch_witness typed enum) anchor. β byte 19 mod 3=1 → axis_b hot-path (3-tuple novelty-falsifier vs 18 absorbed 우선) 와 정렬. γ envelope (Gaia stellar phase-space density) → channel[3] Wasserstein gradient flow on probability measure space 가 Gaia density-on-(l,b)-coordinates + Otto JKO 응용 — direct align. F5 cross-non-overlap 책임은 5 prior pool (raw 122 / raw 135 / P1-P8 / Q1-Q8 / R1-R8) 모두에서 measure-coupling-LP-vs-(algebraic-topology / binary-algebra / 8-paradigm-pool ×3) typed enum 으로 입증; closest 후보 P3 Shannon-info + P5 Bayesian + R4 Pareto + S4 LDP + S3 info-geom 5개 모두 absorption FAIL 명시.

B. '4-tuple form (algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind / closest_existing_raw_id / deterministic_mismatch_test / absorption_test_negative_result)' (rejected: 직전 cycle template 에서는 single closest raw_id 가 명시되지만 본 cycle 은 5+ closest 후보 (P3/P5/R4/S4/S3) 가 동시 존재 — 4-tuple closest_existing_raw_id 단일 슬롯 부족; 3-tuple form 으로 false_positive_candidate_raw_set[] array 사용하는게 적합)

C. '3-tuple form (algebraic_or_structural_mismatch_kind / absorption_test_negative_result / false_positive_candidate_raw_set[]) + 5-substring schema-check' (chosen: 5 closest false-positive 후보 array 화 + 5 substring presence schema check 로 deterministic 강화; raw 53 spirit 충실 + LLM judge 우회 + tool/novelty_falsifier_lint.hexa 향후 구현 시 substring set check 자동화 가능)

E. 'novelty-falsifier 를 typed-enum 만으로 명시 (no array, no prose)' (rejected: typed-enum 만으로는 absorption_test_negative_result 의 specific reject reasoning 부족 — falsifier strength grade 'STRONG' 필요)
